LanguageData.FleshmassNucleus.label: ZAX unit
LanguageData.FleshmassNucleus.description: A ZAX supercomputer core that has become fused with Big MT's FEV mass containment vat. The ZAX unit continues to run its original research directives, directing FEV beast growth and coordinating experimental subjects. It is simultaneously the brain and the tumor of the entire FEV mass organism. Destroying it will collapse the FEV mass structure.
LanguageData.Bulbfreak.label: FEV hulk
LanguageData.Bulbfreak.description: A massive amalgamation of FEV-mutated flesh, all connected by a single distributed nervous system. Two enormous clawed limbs tear through anything in reach. FEV hulks are relatively slow but extremely durable, and the viral mass that composes them is unstable — when they die, the nervous system distributes command to smaller autonomous sub-units, which burst from the collapsing body as independent FEV beasts.\n\nThe smell of rancid bioma typically announces them before they're seen.
LanguageData.Toughspike.label: FEV soldier
LanguageData.Toughspike.description: A FEV beast engineered — perhaps intentionally, perhaps by evolutionary drift — for anti-personnel capability. Two hardened keratin-spike limbs launch dense projectiles at range with surprising accuracy. An armored carapace provides the body with substantial protection against conventional arms.\n\nFEV soldier corpses degrade quickly into FEV slurry if not processed immediately.
LanguageData.Trispike.label: FEV spiker
LanguageData.Fingerspike.label: FEV crawler
LanguageData.Dreadmeld.label: FEV amalgam
